playbook.intent: PM walks into a contested backlog and exits with a defensible, stakeholder-bought-in ordered list anchored to outcomes, not opinions. RICE alone is insufficient when the fight is about strategic value; this stacks Kano plus opportunity-tree plus RICE plus force-ranked OKR alignment.
playbook.scope: PM walks into a contested backlog and exits with a defensible, stakeholder-bought-in ordered list anchored to outcomes, not opinions. RICE alone is insufficient when the fight is about strategic value; this stacks Kano plus opportunity-tree plus RICE plus force-ranked OKR alignment.

success-criteria.criterion: OKR × item map exists for every contested ask
Every item has a Kano class
Top-N has RICE numbers, not opinions

stage.name: Surface contention
stage.intent: Catalogue what the fight is actually about.

tasks.task: Catalogue which items appear on multiple lists vs only one
Identify the items that drive the loudest disagreement

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the contention pattern is visible on one page.

stage.name: Anchor outcomes

tasks.task: Map every contested item to the OKR it claims to serve
Reject items that do not map to any OKR
Surface items that map to multiple OKRs

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every shortlisted item has at least one OKR mapping.

stage.name: Apply Kano
stage.intent: Sort items by need-type, not feeling.

tasks.task: Classify each item as Basic / Performance / Excitement / Indifferent / Reverse
Flag Indifferent + Reverse items for cut

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every item has a Kano class.

stage.name: Walk opportunity tree
stage.intent: Tie each ask to a user opportunity.

tasks.task: Build an opportunity tree from the JTBDs
Map each contested item to a tree node
Surface items that are solutions in search of a problem

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every shortlisted item has an opportunity-tree node.

stage.name: Force-rank with RICE
stage.intent: Apply RICE only to the survivors.

tasks.task: Run RICE on items that passed Kano + opportunity-tree filters

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the top-N has explicit RICE numbers.

stage.name: Stakeholder ratification
stage.intent: Walk the list with stakeholders to lock it.

tasks.task: Run a single ratification meeting with all stakeholders
Use the four-filter rationale (OKR → Kano → tree → RICE)
Lock the list under version control with the rationale

stage.decision-gate: Required: a signed-off list with rationale; no 'verbal agreement'.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content reset-prioritization-war-with-mixed-method-scoring --format md, agent: faion get-content reset-prioritization-war-with-mixed-method-scoring --format context, json: faion get-content reset-prioritization-war-with-mixed-method-scoring --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
